pairing_timeout.description:
The device did not enter pairing mode. Click Submit to try again.

### Troubleshooting
1. Check that the device is not connected to the Ooler mobile app.
2. Unplug the device for 5 seconds, then plug it back in.

progress.wait_for_pairing_mode:
To complete setup, put this device in pairing mode.

### How to enter pairing mode
1. Force quit the Ooler mobile app.
2. Press and hold the power button on the device. Release when the Bluetooth icon starts blinking (approximately 5 seconds).

pause_service.name: Pause connection
pause_service.description: Disconnects the Bluetooth connection to the Ooler for 60 seconds, allowing the mobile app or other controllers to connect during that time.

clean_service.name: Clean
clean_service.description: Activates the UV light to clean the Ooler water system.
